title: buddleja crispa var. farreri
intro: Buddleja crispa var. farreri, also known as Butterfly Bush, is a plant species within the Buddleja genus. It is an ornamental shrub native to China, valued for its vibrant purple flowers and medicinal properties. Traditionally, the plant has been used to treat various health conditions due to its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of Buddleja crispa var. farreri, often in the form of infusions or teas, have been used to alleviate symptoms of fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, while promoting overall well-being and immune function.
